title: Issues | SonarQube Server Documentation
content:
# Managing your code issues

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/issues/introduction/#related-links "Related pages")

- [Issue management solution overview](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/issues/solution-overview/ "Issue management solution overview")
  This page explains how SonarQube Server identifies, assigns, and synchronizes issues, the issue lifecycle, and issue-related features.
- [Retrieving issues](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/issues/retrieving/ "Retrieving issues")
  This page explains how to retrieve and filter issues.
- [Reviewing issues](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/issues/reviewing/ "Reviewing issues")
  This page explains how to view and understand your issues in the SonarQube Server UI.
- [Editing issues](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/issues/managing/ "Editing issues")
  This page explains how to accept, mark as a false positive, reopen, assign, tag, or comment on an issue.
- [Fixing issues](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/issues/fixing/ "Fixing issues")
  This page explains how to get suggested fixes for your issues.
- [Viewing and managing security issues in your DevOps platform](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/issues/security-issues-in-devops-platform/ "Viewing and managing security issues in your DevOps platform")
  This page explains how to view and manage the security issues reported by SonarQube Server in your GitHub or GitLab instance.
- [Subscribing to email notifications](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/managing-your-account/subscribing-to-notifications/ "Subscribing to email notifications")
  This page explains how to configure your account to receive email notifications for issue-related events.
